hero.name: Rafael Dornell Miguel
hero.description: Developer focused on automation and data. I create systems that eliminate manual processes, reduce errors and increase operational efficiency in real companies. Specialist in ETL, data engineering and development with Python, SQL and Power BI.

about.label: BACKGROUND
about.name: Rafael Dornell Miguel
about.description: I work on developing data-driven solutions, focusing on ETL, automation and system integration. At Clinicorp Solution, I was responsible for critical data projects, including acting as a technical QA and developing internal tools that drastically reduced manual work.
about.experience: I have practical experience with Python, SQL and JavaScript/TypeScript, creating APIs, pipelines and systems that connect different data sources with efficiency and reliability. My specialty is transforming data into actionable insights through ETL, Power BI and process automation.

services.title: Services
services.etlDesc: Robust data pipelines, data transformation and interactive dashboards with Power BI
services.dadosDesc: Scalable data architecture, data warehousing and database optimization
services.backendDesc: REST APIs, microservices and backend systems with Python, Node.js and SQL
services.consultoriaDesc: Data strategy, process optimization and digital transformation
